description: Set boundary conditions along flow plane edges.

keywords.name: discharge
keywords.description: Set discharge boundary condition. Discharge is per unit length of a joint trace on the boundary surface. The specified discharge is cumulative, so the discharge specified is added to the existing discharge boundary condition. An optional proppant volume concentration may be specified for the injected fluid using the proppant keyword.

keywords.name: flux
keywords.description: Set heat-flux boundary conditions for convection on flow pipes in the range.

keywords.name: kwd:fish
keywords.description: The specified FISH symbol is used to provide a multiplier.

keywords.name: kwd:table
keywords.description: Set the load multiplier from a table given by the table create command. The table must consist of a list of pairs: time, f(time). Linear interpolation is performed between the given discrete points.
